title: acetosella arbuscula
intro: Acetosella arbuscula, also known as the dwarf cranberry or mountain cranberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to mountainous regions of the Andes. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Acetosella arbuscula include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
